name: openclaw-joaxclaw-fs
description: OpenClaw gateway plugin: exposes JoaxClaw teams (~/.openclaw/teams) and processes (~/.openclaw/processes) over the gateway as teams.* / processes.* RPC methods, plus engines.* host-side local-LLM probing, memory.* host-side skill management, host.metrics host CPU/RAM/GPU, and script_start background job tracking (jobs.*) — so they all work on a remote gateway.
author: Joaquin Ayuso <joaxap@gmail.com>
